notes.title: Richer timeline
notes.subtitle: Grouped history
notes.body: The demo now shows a changelog grouped into major-version sections instead of one flat stream of releases.

notes.title: Sticky section headers
notes.body: As you scroll, the pinned header now reflects the active section title instead of the current version badge.

notes.title: Presentation polish
notes.subtitle: Missed versions stack cleanly
notes.body: Missed versions still appear inline in the current view while the history view is organized by major release.

notes.title: Visual cleanup
notes.body: Spacing and layout remain readable even when the feed includes many versions.

notes.title: Release grouping
notes.body: The demo history now groups related minor and patch releases under the same major header.

notes.title: Richer timeline
notes.subtitle: Grouped history
notes.body: The demo now shows a changelog grouped into major-version sections instead of one flat stream of releases.

notes.title: Sticky section headers
notes.body: As you scroll, the pinned header now reflects the active section title instead of the current version badge.

notes.title: Presentation polish
notes.body: Tuned spacing around inline version badges and section headers after grouping the sample history.

notes.title: Shared components
notes.body: History and current release layouts continue to reuse the same underlying components with fuller data.

notes.title: String overrides
notes.body: All visible copy can be configured through SwiftNEWStrings.

notes.title: Injected data
notes.body: Release notes content is driven directly by supplied model data in the demo.

notes.title: Stability fixes
notes.body: Resolved a few issues found while rendering long note bodies in the demo.

notes.title: Color refresh
notes.body: Adjusted accent treatments to keep long histories easy to scan.

notes.title: Release cadence
notes.body: Added more minor releases so the demo better represents real changelog cadence.

notes.title: Metadata polish
notes.body: Refined how subtitles and notes balance when some releases have only one item.

notes.title: Unified layout
notes.body: The demo adopted a shared layout system for current and historical release sections.

notes.title: History archive
notes.body: Introduced a clearer archive section for browsing older changes.

notes.title: Visual tuning
notes.body: Polished icon backgrounds and spacing in compact layouts.

notes.title: Long-form support
notes.body: Improved the demo content so it can show a deeper stack of historical versions.

notes.title: Copy cleanup
notes.body: Balanced note body lengths for more realistic sample content.

notes.title: Component split
notes.body: The release notes view was broken into smaller reusable pieces for the demo app.
